title: Sony lays off most of Destiny 2 team and confirms 292 layoffs at Bungie
summary: Sony's restructuring affects nearly the entire Destiny 2 team and part of the Marathon team, in a new wave of cuts.

title: GTA 6 will launch in 2026 at a price of $80 and without a physical disc edition
summary: Rockstar reveals details of the most anticipated game, including pre-order editions, technical specifications, and the controversy over the lack of a disc.

title: Microsoft increases price of Xbox Series worldwide and discontinues the 2TB model
summary: The component crisis and the increase in RAM cost cause a global price increase for Xbox consoles.

title: Valve clarifies support and limitations of the Steam Machine, which will not have the same longevity as Steam Deck
summary: Valve's new console faces criticism for its performance, compatibility, and update plans, while a French store launches an imitation.

title: Deltarune Chapter 5 takes Steam by storm and announces Chapter 6 for 2027
summary: The new chapter of Toby Fox's game reaches nearly 300,000 concurrent players and receives a large number of guides and analyses.

title: Compulsion Games employees seek work amid possible mass layoffs at Xbox
summary: Workers at the South of Midnight studio announce their departure while rumors of a major restructuring at Microsoft grow.

title: Steam Summer Sale 2026 offers big discounts on thousands of games
summary: Steam's summer sale includes titles like PC Gamer's 2025 GOTY and other games at historic low prices.

title: Epic Games calls Valve's policy on AI labels on Steam irresponsible
summary: Tim Sweeney criticizes Valve's decision to require AI-labeled games, arguing it is harmful to developers.

title: The electronic components crisis drives up prices of RAM and devices
summary: The increase in the cost of chips affects manufacturers like Apple and Micron, which expects a gradual improvement starting in 2028.

title: Wildgate ends development after a final update, one year after its launch
summary: The space shooter from former Blizzard developers receives its final patch and will continue to run, but without new content.

title: Capcom shows first gameplay preview of Onimusha: Way of the Sword
summary: New images and details of the return of the action and historical horror saga are revealed in a trailer.

title: Enshrouded confirms its 1.0 launch for October 15 on PS5 and PC
summary: The survival and action game will arrive first on PlayStation consoles and PC, and later on Xbox Series.

title: Monster Hunter Stories 3 releases a side story DLC and a free update
summary: The 'Rudy' additional content is now available, along with new real monsters and additional features.

title: Capcom reveals first details of Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen
summary: The open-world RPG expansion will include new regions, enemies, and gameplay features.

title: Sonic sparks controversy by asking permission to use player data in an ARG with AI
summary: Fans criticize SEGA for requesting consent to train generative artificial intelligence through an alternate reality game.

title: Marvel's Wolverine will launch with a physical disc, unlike GTA 6
summary: Insomniac Games confirms that the superhero game will include a disc in its physical edition, in contrast to the digital trend.

title: FromSoftware CEO retains his position despite investor criticism for not exploiting Elden Ring
summary: The parent company backs the executive after complaints from shareholders who believe that Elden Ring's success has not been capitalized on enough.

title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3 guides: sprite and character locations
summary: Multiple guides help players find all items and complete challenges in the new season of the battle royale.

title: Complete Star Fox guides for Switch 2: routes, amiibo, and secrets
summary: Detailed tutorials explain how to unlock all levels and features in the classic shooter on the new console.

title: Forza Horizon 6 guides: bamboo locations and car encounters
summary: Locations to complete objectives in the latest installment of the open-world racing saga are revealed.
